title: The Forgotten Archive
description: An archive node only un-locks itself in autumn, and only for archivists who have decoded enough of the old shrine-glyphs and built trust with the keeper.
author: Terminal Quest team

steps.description: The archive only opens in autumn or winter
Carry a lantern of any kind to read the dark stacks
Wait until at least turn 60 - the archive bonds slowly

scholar.text: The keeper signs your archivist seal. A panel slides open: rows of indexed glyphs, all yours.

vandal.text: You crack the seal anyway. The keeper turns away from you for the rest of the season.

respectful.text: You take a single decoded glyph and leave a thank-you note. The archive lock clicks shut behind you.
